argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const questionId = '{{ id }}'; const limit = {{ limit }}; const strip = (html) => (html || '').replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '').replace(/ /g, ' ').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>').replace(/&/g, '&').trim(); const url = 'https://www.zhihu.com/api/v4/questions/' + questionId + '/answers?limit=' + limit + '&offset=0&sort_by=default&include=data[*].content,voteup_count,comment_count,author'; const res = await fetch(url, { credentials: 'include' }); if (!res.ok) return { __httpError: res.status }; const data = await res.json(); return (data?.data || []).map((item, i) => ({ rank: i + 1, author: item.author?.name || 'anonymous', votes: item.voteup_count || 0, content: strip(item.content || '').substring(0, 200) })); }
